name: a-op
description: a-op: artist-owned platform, an open-source web application for musicians.

scripts.verify:foundation: npm run build && node scripts/verify-runtime-artifact.mjs && node --test tests/foundation.test.mjs
scripts.verify:runtime:unit: node --test tests/access-contract.test.mjs tests/auth-runtime.test.mjs tests/db-bootstrap.test.mjs tests/media-range.test.mjs tests/media-records.test.mjs tests/module-registry.test.mjs tests/route-alignment.test.mjs tests/mutation-boundary.test.mjs tests/mutation-write-boundaries.test.mjs tests/r2-store.test.mjs tests/runtime-envelope.test.mjs tests/runtime-proofs.test.mjs tests/schema-contract.test.mjs tests/site-read-contract.test.mjs tests/site-validation.test.mjs
